name: Hagia Sophia
description: A former Byzantine cathedral and Ottoman mosque, now a museum showcasing stunning mosaics and architectural grandeur.

name: Topkapi Palace
description: The former residence of Ottoman sultans, featuring opulent rooms, sacred relics, and beautiful gardens.

name: Grand Bazaar
description: One of the world's oldest and largest covered markets, offering spices, textiles, jewelry, and traditional crafts.

name: Blue Mosque
description: A stunning Ottoman mosque known for its blue tiles, six minarets, and serene courtyard.

name: Spice Bazaar
description: A historic market specializing in spices, herbs, Turkish delight, and exotic foods from around the world.

name: Bosphorus Cruise
description: A scenic boat tour along the Bosphorus Strait, offering views of palaces, bridges, and waterfront mansions.

name: Chora Church
description: A Byzantine church famous for its stunning mosaics and frescoes depicting biblical scenes.

name: Istanbul Modern
description: Turkey's first modern art museum, featuring contemporary Turkish and international art collections.

name: Galata Tower
description: A medieval tower offering panoramic views of Istanbul, with a rich history dating back to the Byzantine era.

name: Taksim Square
description: Istanbul's bustling central square, surrounded by shops, restaurants, and cultural venues.
